好消息：一枚爱加更的好宝宝啊啊啊◟(˶> ᎑ <˶)◞
老大我爱你，除非你三观突然爆炸，不然我誓死追随你！！！！！好好看好好看好甜啊啊啊，双向救赎也太好磕了，终于又让我再番茄找到一本好的无限流了呜呜呜呜呜","text_exts":[{"e":88,"s":84,"text":"双向救赎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E6%95%91%E8%B5%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399857577EC61CB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227504902373312430873%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227491926064118123582%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E6%95%91%E8%B5%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747375999,"group_id":"7491926064118123582","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"记忆是最无用的继承","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5B5gr3g4pD6IJYmGZ28Fkk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8a3ecd5ffb56431f87092537a9dfffbb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533318&x-signature=KqFxEE0fzVTFip2n87BYQ216wy4%3D","user_id":"989190277300604","user_name":"一吻别六年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"989190277300604","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7491926064118123582","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+无限流+团宠+沙雕治愈+1v1双洁+双向救赎】
吸血鬼会变猫战力天花板攻x没有恐惧值小可怜可爱受
（非传统无限流，受纯人类但当npc，越往后看越轻松搞笑）
许星愿母亲离世，父亲火速再娶，继母暗地虐待，鸠占鹊巢。
他们偷偷将一张死亡车票塞到许星愿的书包里。
阴差阳错，许星愿来到了一个名叫怪物公寓的地方。
他成为了无限流世界里唯一的活人npc。
公寓里看似普通的npc，却一个个来头不小。
尤其是顶楼的那位，谁都不敢惹。
不知何时，他成了鬼怪们的心尖宠。
顶楼那位大佬，更是宠到极致，把许星愿捧在了手心里。
-
再次和曾经的家人见面，是在等级为S的副本中。
他们又想和从前一样，内心阴毒，充满算计。
却没想到，被他们当成累赘的许星愿早就不是当初的小可怜了！
俊美至极的男人，悄无声息站在许星愿身后，充满占有欲地圈住他的身体，声音低哑道：
“宝宝，全部杀掉，做成人偶给你玩，好不好？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/92c74cb6dd48b65ae112579602a588a6","author":"夏日暖萤","author_id":"","book_id":"7491926064118123582","book_name":"小可怜杀疯副本，神明老公拐回家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7491926289482269246","read_count":"38528","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1094431"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"487","tags":"双男主,无限流,团宠,现代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8fccaa7a4f582b2fe9d901d9bf766837~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182575&x-signature=CteZI9zzWd0CwlUA3qkJ1a48LRY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4388869064635325","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"133"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172255D5EFCF4E759977EC61CB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":52,"forwarded_count":0
